description_long: This object consists of three standard traffic cones, each featuring a conical shape with a wide, square base for stability. The cones are primarily orange with two broad, horizontal gray reflective stripes encircling the upper and middle sections. The surfaces show visible signs of wear, including dirt, scuff marks, and some fading, suggesting prolonged outdoor use. The tips of the cones are slightly rounded and solid, maintaining the same orange color as the rest of the cone. The bases are flat, thick, and textured, providing grip and preventing tipping. No visible logos or manufacturer markings are present except for a grid mat beneath, which is not part of the cones themselves.
description: A group of three orange traffic cones with gray reflective stripes, showing signs of wear and outdoor use. Each cone has a wide, stable base and a rounded tip.
description_view_0: Three traffic cones are visible, two upright and one lying on its side, clearly showing the orange color and gray reflective stripes.
description_view_1: The cones are seen from a diagonal angle, highlighting the conical shape and the reflective bands, with one cone partially obscured.
description_view_2: The bases of the cones are more visible, especially the underside of the cone lying down, showing dirt and wear.
description_view_3: The cones are viewed from behind, emphasizing the square bases and the weathered texture of the surfaces.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Each cone has two wide, horizontal gray reflective stripes encircling the upper and middle sections.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or holes.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, square, and flat with a thick, textured structure for stability and grip; it appears slightly dirty and worn.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos or markings are visible on the cones themselves.
attribute_condition: Worn and dirty, with visible scuff marks and some fading, indicating prolonged outdoor use.
